summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of digital 8-track recorder with new features: timeline zoom controls (1x-10x), navigation arrows, punch-in recording with measure/beat timing, and MP3 export using lamejs at 192kbps. All major features tested successfully.

design_issues.issue: Metronome toggle location unclear - triangle icon visible in LCD display but specific data-testid not found
Navigation arrows disabled by default until zoom creates scrollable content - this is expected behavior

passed_tests: Timeline zoom controls visible (zoom in/out buttons, zoom level display)
Zoom in button increases zoom level from 1.0x to 1.5x
Zoom out button decreases zoom level back to 1.0x
Timeline navigation arrows functional after zoom creates scrollable content
Time ruler shows time markers with proper formatting
Punch In/Out toggle enables/disables punch recording mode
Punch In/Out measure/beat inputs editable when enabled (tested 3:2 to 5:4)
Export dialog shows both WAV and MP3 options
MP3 option shows '192kbps using LAME encoder' text (not 'coming soon')
Track arm/mute/solo buttons work for all tracks
Keyboard shortcuts (Space for play/pause, R for record, Escape for stop)
Audio engine initialization on user interaction
